---
title: Intérieur de salon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794107/interieursalon_nuhwip.png
description: Intérieur de salon
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/05/13
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794107/interieursalon_nuhwip.png)
